instruction: Clarify which versions of Gutenberg Blocks are affected by the vulnerability.
input: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Kadence WP Gutenberg Blocks by Kadence Blocks allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Gutenberg Blocks by Kadence Blocks: from n/a through 3.3.1.
output: The affected versions of Gutenberg Blocks by Kadence Blocks are those released up to and including version 3.3.1.
